query: Austrian Kaiserschmarrn torn fluffy pancake with raisins and plum compote

draft.title: Kaiserschmarrn
draft.description: Austrian torn fluffy pancake with raisins, served with a sweet plum compote. Light, airy, and perfect for dessert or a special breakfast.

steps.text: Separate the eggs. In a bowl, whisk the egg yolks with milk, flour, sugar, and salt until smooth.
In a separate clean bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold the egg whites into the batter, then fold in the soaked raisins.
Heat half the butter in a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat. Pour in the batter and cook for about 4-5 minutes until the bottom is golden.
Using a spatula, carefully flip the pancake in sections or invert onto a plate and slide back into the pan to cook the other side for 3-4 minutes.
Using two forks, tear the pancake into bite-sized pieces in the pan. Add the remaining butter and continue cooking, stirring gently, until pieces are golden and slightly crisp.
Serve warm, dusted with powdered sugar and accompanied by plum compote.
